CustomField.description: Please select 'Yes' if the Straight Line Revenue (SLR) method applies to this rent schedule. Note that selecting this option will not directly generate SLR schedules. Instead, it will utilize the specified Average SLR amount to generate journals.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please select 'Yes' if the Straight Line Revenue (SLR) method applies to this rent schedule. Note that selecting this option will not directly generate SLR schedules. Instead, it will utilize the specified Average SLR amount to generate journals.
CustomField.label: SLR Applicable?
